name: aws
appliesWhen: preferredStack or discovery mentions AWS / Lambda / Cognito / S3 / DynamoDB / API Gateway, OR any infra/deploy agent on an AWS project

officialRepos.name: aws-powertools/powertools-lambda-typescript
officialRepos.why: Idempotency, structured logging, metrics (EMF), tracing, parameters utilities. The default Lambda toolbox for TS.

officialRepos.name: aws-powertools/powertools-lambda-python
officialRepos.why: Same utilities for Python Lambdas (idempotency, batch, validation).

officialRepos.name: aws/aws-sdk-js-v3
officialRepos.why: Modular AWS SDK v3 for Node/Lambda — tree-shakeable clients, presigned URL helpers.

officialRepos.name: aws-amplify/amplify-js
officialRepos.why: Cognito auth flows (user pools, federated identity, hosted UI) reference for web/mobile clients.

officialRepos.name: aws-samples/serverless-patterns
officialRepos.why: Hundreds of vetted API GW / Lambda / DynamoDB / EventBridge integration patterns (CDK + SAM + Terraform).

officialRepos.name: aws-samples/aws-dynamodb-examples
officialRepos.why: Single-table design and access-pattern modeling examples.
